entities.name: Completion of the Work (CI)
entities.raw_quote: On Thursday begin in the morning; saying as you said on the preceding, and then you should make a bed of hay...

entities.name: 100 Dei vivi nomina
entities.raw_quote: (2) 100 Dei vivi nomina. 1. Agla, 2. Monon, 3. Tetragramaton...

entities.name: Clear cold spring water
entities.raw_quote: He should take clear cold spring water, and wash himself...

entities.name: Sackcloth and black garments
entities.raw_quote: Then he should put on a sackcloth and black garments...

entities.name: Choir
entities.raw_quote: ...enter the choir, in which he should sit.

entities.name: Orha
entities.raw_quote: (24) Orha, qui per Gabrielem beate Marie virgini... nunium tue incarnacionis...

entities.name: Christus

attributes.meaning: Overshadowed in womb like sun through glass

entities.raw_quote: Christus, qui sicut sol per vitrum in eius utero... obumbrasti.

entities.name: Hospesk

attributes.meaning: Made dry staff sprout flowers for Joseph

entities.raw_quote: (25) Hospesk, qui in manibus Ioseph virgam siccam florere fecisti.

entities.name: Gofgar

attributes.meaning: Sent John the Baptist as testimony

entities.raw_quote: (26) Gofgar, qui adventus tui per Iohannem baptistam... testimonium...

entities.name: Occynnomos

attributes.meaning: Sent star to Kings Caspar, Melchior, Balthasar

entities.raw_quote: (27) Occynnomos, qui tribus regibus te adorare volentibus... stellam previam transmisisti...

entities.name: Eliorem
entities.raw_quote: (29) Eliorem, qui in templo Salomonis... ipsi Symeoni dedisti cognicionis effectum...

entities.name: Heloy

attributes.meaning: Turned water into wine at wedding

entities.raw_quote: (30) Heloy, qui ad architriclini nupcias aquam in vinum convertisti.

entities.name: Archima
entities.raw_quote: (31) Archima, qui 32 annis populo tuo fidem catholicam predicasti...

entities.name: Rabur
entities.raw_quote: (32) Rabur, qui 40 dierum spacio in deserto ieiunasti...

entities.name: Divine Vision
entities.raw_quote: ...divina visio non est super ipsum coaccio immo preces...

summary: This chunk details the final stages of a ritual (CI), including the preparation of a hay bed on ashes and the recitation of 100 Divine Names. It prescribes purification through cold water, specific attire (sackcloth/black garments), and a lengthy prayer invoking divine names associated with biblical events like the Nativity and Resurrection to achieve a vision of God while alive.
key_passages: "On Thursday begin in the morning; saying as you said on the preceding, and then you should make a bed of hay..."
"100 Dei vivi nomina. 1. Agla, 2. Monon, 3. Tetragramaton..."
"He should take clear cold spring water, and wash himself, saying: 'Domine, sancte Pater...'"
"Then he should put on a sackcloth and black garments, then enter the choir..."
"The operator must have a great will to perform the work, and must be cleansed inwardly from all filth..."
